channel.title: NPR Topics: News
channel.description: NPR news, audio, and podcasts. Coverage of breaking stories, national and world news, politics, business, science, technology, and extended coverage of major national and world events.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Trump taps former FEMA director to lead the disaster agency again
item.description: Cameron Hamilton led FEMA briefly in 2025. He was removed by the Trump administration after telling Congress that the agency should continue to exist. Now, he's been nominated to lead it once again.
item.content:encoded:
Cameron Hamilton led FEMA briefly in 2025. He was removed by the Trump administration after telling Congress that the agency should continue to exist. Now, he's been nominated to lead it once again.

(Image credit: Jose Luis Magana)
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Hersher

item.title: Nonprofit sues the federal government over plans to paint Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool blue
item.description: The Cultural Landscape Foundation, a nonprofit advocacy organization, is asking a federal judge to halt President Trump's plans to resurface the reflecting pool on the National Mall.
item.content:encoded:
The Cultural Landscape Foundation, a nonprofit advocacy organization, is asking a federal judge to halt President Trump's plans to resurface the reflecting pool on the National Mall.

(Image credit: Jose Luis Magana)
item.dc:creator: Anastasia Tsioulcas

item.title: Why cruise ship passengers with possible hantavirus exposure went to Nebraska
item.description: The University of Nebraska is home to the only federally funded quarantine unit in the U.S. and a separate biocontainment unit that can treat people exposed to infectious diseases.
item.content:encoded: The University of Nebraska is home to the only federally funded quarantine unit in the U.S. and a separate biocontainment unit that can treat people exposed to infectious diseases.
item.dc:creator: Scott Neuman

item.title: New poll finds a majority of Americans unsure if attempts on Trump's life were real
item.description: When given the options of "true," "false" or "not sure," and asked whether each of the incidents "was staged," a majority of respondents said they thought each event was either staged or were unsure.
item.content:encoded:
When given the options of "true," "false" or "not sure," and asked whether each of the incidents "was staged," a majority of respondents said they thought each event was either staged or were unsure.

(Image credit: Mandel Ngan)
item.dc:creator: Elena Moore

item.title: Abortion pill by mail allowed for at least 3 more days, the Supreme Court says
item.description: Full access to the abortion pill mifepristone, including through telemedicine and the mail, will continue for at least three more days, the high court said on Monday.
item.content:encoded:
Full access to the abortion pill mifepristone, including through telemedicine and the mail, will continue for at least three more days, the high court said on Monday.

(Image credit: Anna Moneymaker)
item.dc:creator: Selena Simmons-Duffin

item.title: Can Chinese AI solve inequality? + How dementia comes for your bank account
item.dc:creator: Cooper Katz McKim

item.title: Trump wants to suspend the federal gas tax as prices soar amid war with Iran
item.description: Suspending the federal gas tax would require an act of Congress.
item.content:encoded:
Suspending the federal gas tax would require an act of Congress.

(Image credit: Justin Sullivan)
item.dc:creator: Danielle Kurtzleben

item.title: 'Atlanta Journal-Constitution' chief steps down as bold goals yield to tough realities
item.description: The owners of the Atlanta Journal-Constitution invested $150 million to reinvent the paper. The changes have been significant. Three years in, the payoff has been modest.
item.content:encoded:
The owners of the Atlanta Journal-Constitution invested $150 million to reinvent the paper. The changes have been significant. Three years in, the payoff has been modest.

(Image credit: Paras Griffin)
item.dc:creator: David Folkenflik

item.title: Trump rejects Iran's ceasefire proposal response. And, Congress to tackle ICE funding
item.description: Trump rejected Iran's response to a U.S. peace proposal, calling it "totally unacceptable." And, Congressional Republicans are trying to push for three years of funding for immigration enforcement.
item.content:encoded:
Trump rejected Iran's response to a U.S. peace proposal, calling it "totally unacceptable." And, Congressional Republicans are trying to push for three years of funding for immigration enforcement.

(Image credit: Alex Wong)
item.dc:creator: Brittney Melton

item.title: Oregon's most unexpected gubernatorial candidate? A pencil with a point
item.description: Oregon's public schools rank last in fourth-grade reading, according to an analysis of national testing. As a wake-up call for elected leaders, Pencil is running for governor as a write-in candidate.
item.content:encoded:
Oregon's public schools rank last in fourth-grade reading, according to an analysis of national testing. As a wake-up call for elected leaders, Pencil is running for governor as a write-in candidate.

(Image credit: Eli Imadali)
item.dc:creator: Dirk VanderHart
